# FACTION(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  faction — show faction status

## SYNOPSIS
  faction [OPTIONS] [ARGS]

## DESCRIPTION
Display your standing with all major factions.

## OPTIONS
  (no options — shows all factions)
